description: Discussion on validator updates, commission changes, and monitoring commission cheating schemes. John from Solana Labs proposes a vote program change to limit commission changes to the first half of the epoch. Marinade team discusses commission cheaters and a new validator dashboard.
topic_summary: Validator Community Call covering updates on commission changes [t=18:28], Marinade's monitoring of commission cheaters [t=32:32], and a new validator dashboard [t=47:60]. John discusses a proposal to limit commission changes [t=194:18].
